diff:
diff --git a/src/http_headers.py b/src/http_headers.py
index 65417cd..6e966ae 100644
--- a/src/http_headers.py
+++ b/src/http_headers.py
@@ -1,6 +1,9 @@
 def build_headers(token, extra=None):
-    extra = extra or {}
-    extra.setdefault("Accept", "application/json")
+    # Create a new headers dictionary without mutating the caller's input
+    headers = dict(extra) if extra else {}
+    # Ensure default headers
+    headers.setdefault("Accept", "application/json")
+    # Add Authorization header if token provided
     if token:
-        extra["Authorization"] = token
-    return extra
+        headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
+    return headers
